description_long: This is a single red velvet muffin topped with a generous swirl of white buttercream frosting. The frosting is decorated with colorful heart-shaped sugar decorations and small round sprinkles in pink, black, and white. The muffin itself is encased in a crinkled, semi-translucent brown paper wrapper, which is slightly uneven around the edges. The cake portion appears moist and dense, with a rich reddish-brown color visible beneath the frosting. The frosting is piped in a decorative, swirling pattern, giving the muffin a festive and appealing look. The overall appearance is inviting and suggests a sweet, celebratory treat suitable for urban cafes or bakeries.
description: A red velvet muffin with swirled white buttercream frosting, topped with colorful heart-shaped sugar decorations and sprinkles, in a brown paper wrapper.
description_view_0: The muffin is shown with a prominent swirl of frosting and several heart-shaped sugar decorations visible on top, with the wrapper slightly crinkled on the left.
description_view_1: This view highlights the central peak of the frosting and a cluster of pink and white decorations, with the wrapper appearing more evenly distributed.
description_view_2: The right side of the muffin is visible, showing more of the reddish cake and a clear view of the heart-shaped decorations and sprinkles on the frosting.
description_view_3: The frosting's swirl is most pronounced here, with a concentration of pink heart decorations and a slightly more open wrapper edge.
